tagline: [Working name / tagline. This is the thesis doc — read first for the full "why." It changes slowly.]
coreInsight: [What's the non-obvious idea this project rests on? Why now, and why is this the angle others miss? Be specific enough to be wrong.]
audience: [The user. If you're the first user / dogfooder, say so — it solves the hardest retention problem and is a feature, not an apology.]
coreLoop: [Step 1 of the repeating cycle the product runs]
[Step 2 — name which step carries the real value vs. which is just raw material / plumbing]
buildSequencing: [What gets built first and why — the riskiest, highest-value thing first. What's deliberately deferred. The anti-goal: polishing well-understood plumbing while dodging the hard, fuzzy part.]

validation.nearTerm: [The near-term gate, answerable in a week or two. Specific and falsifiable — not 'users seem happy.']
validation.ultimate: [The ultimate gate that says this worked.]

openQuestions: [The things you don't know yet and will resolve with evidence.]
